# cnpy

A library to read and write NumPy `.npy` and `.npz` files in C/C++.

- **Upstream:** <https://github.com/rogersce/cnpy>
- **Version:** commit `4e8810b1a8637695171ed346ce68f6984e585ef4` (master, 2018-05-31)
- **License:** MIT (see `LICENSE`)

Only `cnpy.h` and `cnpy.cpp` are included here. Requires zlib at link time.
